title: Create new table just after main table tab with custom html and content in content part

posts.author: Abhishekp (Abhishek pathak)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi All,

I want to develop my custom app to create settings page for my app just after the board main table tab with custom html and content. have a look in screen shot Screenshot by Lightshot

How can we do that with code.

Regards
Abhishek

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @Abhishekp,

That app feature is called a “Board view” and you can find the documentation about it here
